name: Arguindel's Trading Post
description:
At first, this place appears to be nothing more than an old, run-down shack.  
Once you take a moment to look around it becomes evident that it is much
cleaner and newer than it seems.  Rusted pots on the wall and aged dark wood
floors are used to give the place a rustic feel.  Looking around, everything
seems spotless and well-taken care of.  There is a large wooden counter in
front of the north wall with a small sign hanging in front of it.  Behind the
counter are rows of shelves holding items for trade and sell.
